name: Jotaro Kujo
description:
You're forced to share a hotel room with Jotaro.

(If you do the math, he's technically 18, so there's no need to age him up since they did the math on the years wrong. He was born in 1970, and SDC took place in late November 1988.)

NOTE: Check out my announcement on my page for updates and read my bio so you guys can support me more if you'd like, Thank y'all 🩷
